tokens.range: properly, to bore, i.e. (by implication) to wound, to dissolve; figuratively, to profane (a person, place or thing), to break (one's word), to begin (as if by an 'opening wedge'); to play (the flute)

a sickle (as cutting)
properly, to score with a mark as a tally or record, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe, and also to enumerate; intensively, to recount, i.e. celebrate

something that rises, i.e. a stalk of grain
literally, sevened, i.e. a week (specifically, of years)

seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number
